data.title: FG Nexus disclosed that it holds 37,594 ETH and has repurchased over $32 million worth of common stock.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed Ethereum treasury company FG Nexus disclosed that as of January 20, it held 37,594 ETH, had total outstanding debt of $1.9 million, and 33.6 million outstanding common shares. Furthermore, FG Nexus stated that it had repurchased approximately 9.9 million common shares at an average price of approximately $3.24 per share and approximately 53,000 preferred shares at an average price of approximately $24.16 per share, for a total value exceeding $32 million. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Gate Research: With $2.1 billion in options trading imminent, the cost-effectiveness of long volatility portfolio strategies is increasing.
data.description: According to Gate Research, approximately $2.1 billion worth of BTC and ETH options will be settled this Friday. Currently, the implied volatility (IV) for BTC and ETH is 42% and 56% respectively, with ETH IV falling to an extremely low level at the 1.1% percentile over the past year. Over the past week, the 25-Delta Skew for both BTC and ETH has been significantly negative, with the short-term (7D/30D) declines being the most pronounced, indicating a significant increase in demand for short-term downside hedging through concentrated buying of put options. In terms of block trades, the BTC and ETH options market in the last 24 hours has been dominated by put spreads; the structure is BTC put spread buy 88k/sell 90k (30JAN26-P), with a total volume of approximately 1,115 BTC and net premium income of approximately $730,000. An ETH long volatility straddle strategy was executed, buying 2800-P & 3200-C, with a total trading volume of approximately 5,000 ETH and a net premium expenditure of $2.03 million.

data.title: JustLend DAO's Total Value Locked Surpasses $6.72 Billion
data.description:
The latest weekly report from JustLend DAO, a leading decentralized lending protocol on the TRON network, reveals that the platform's total value locked has exceeded $6.72 billion. According to ChainCatcher, the number of users has also surpassed 480,000.

As a core DeFi infrastructure within the TRON ecosystem, JustLend DAO is demonstrating robust growth in the DeFi market, offering efficient on-chain lending services to users worldwide.

data.title: Solana's Decline Impacts Treasury Holdings Amid Investor Caution
data.description:
Companies holding Solana (SOL) as a treasury asset are experiencing significant unrealized losses following a substantial price decline since January. According to NS3.AI, major holders such as Forward Industries have seen losses surpassing $700 million. Despite these setbacks, Forward Industries remains optimistic about Solana's future, citing an aggressive upgrade roadmap planned for 2026 and record-high staking ratios that bolster network security.

Market activity indicates a pause in SOL accumulation by digital asset treasuries and ETF outflows, reflecting cautious investor sentiment. There is potential downside risk if support levels fall below $120, which could further impact investor confidence.

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Highlights Importance of Federal Reserve's Independence
data.description: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon emphasized the critical importance of the Federal Reserve's independence. According to Odaily, Dimon also mentioned that he generally does not support tariffs. He expressed concerns that the rapid development of artificial intelligence might be too swift for society to handle. Additionally, Dimon predicted that in five years, the number of jobs in the banking sector will be fewer than today.

data.title: Suzhou's Five-Year Plan to Boost Digital Finance and AI Integration
data.description: Suzhou city government has unveiled its 15th Five-Year Plan, emphasizing the enhancement of its financial service system and the advancement of high-quality digital finance development. According to NS3.AI, the plan seeks to broaden the application of digital Renminbi (RMB) innovations throughout various sectors and regions within the city. Furthermore, it includes initiatives to pilot 'AI + Finance' applications and aims to establish a national digital finance key laboratory.

data.title: State Street Investment Management: The Federal Reserve may cut interest rates three times in 2026.
data.description: State Street Investment Management stated that the Federal Reserve may cut interest rates three times in 2026. (Jinshi)

data.title: OpenAI CEO Addresses Elon Musk's Concerns Over ChatGPT Safety
data.description: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman has responded to U.S. President Donald Trump's concerns about the safety of ChatGPT following Elon Musk's warnings. According to NS3.AI, Musk cited deaths allegedly associated with the AI chatbot, prompting Altman to highlight Musk's hypocrisy by referencing Tesla Autopilot crashes linked to fatalities. Altman emphasized OpenAI's continuous efforts to enhance safety, especially in light of ongoing lawsuits. This exchange highlights the enduring tensions between Altman and Musk, as regulatory scrutiny of AI chatbots intensifies.

data.title: Vietnam launches pilot program for cryptocurrency trading platform licenses
data.description: Vietnam's Ministry of Finance issued a resolution this week to launch a pilot program for formal licensing of cryptocurrency trading platforms, aiming to bring the industry out of a long-standing legal gray area and into the regulatory framework. According to the resolution, the State Securities Commission will be responsible for issuing, adjusting, and revoking operating licenses for cryptocurrency trading platforms, and has published detailed application guidelines. The system requires applicant companies to be Vietnamese companies with a minimum paid-up capital of 10 trillion VND (approximately US$380 million) and to meet stringent standards regarding infrastructure, governance, cybersecurity, and professional staffing. Currently, about 10 securities companies and banks have indicated their intention to enter the market after obtaining licenses. (Cryptonews)

data.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon: Federal Reserve independence is crucial
data.description: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon stated that the Federal Reserve's independence is crucial, and added that he is generally not a proponent of tariffs. He also noted that the pace of artificial intelligence development may be too fast for society, and that there will be fewer banking jobs in five years than there are now. (Jinshi)

data.title: Suzhou's "15th Five-Year Plan" proposes to expand the innovative applications of digital RMB across the entire city and in all sectors.
data.description: According to the Suzhou Municipal People's Government website, the Suzhou Municipal Party Committee issued a proposal on formulating the 15th Five-Year Plan for National Economic and Social Development of Suzhou. The proposal points out that the financial service system will be improved, the action plan for promoting the high-quality development of digital finance will be implemented, the innovative application of digital RMB will be expanded throughout the city and in all fields, the pilot application of "artificial intelligence + finance" will be promoted, and efforts will be made to build a national key laboratory for digital finance.

data.title: Trump will not announce his nominee for Federal Reserve Chair during the Davos Forum.
data.description: A senior White House official said Trump will not announce his nominee for Federal Reserve Chair during the Davos Forum, as he has not yet made up his mind. (Jinshi)

data.title: $3.7 million worth of AIA tokens were transferred from the team's wallet, some of which may be for sale.
data.description: According to onchainschool.pro, approximately 5 hours ago, $3.7 million worth of AIA was transferred out of the team's wallet. Subsequently, a portion of these tokens (worth approximately $778,000) was transferred to a new wallet, likely in preparation for a sale. Analysts indicate that if these tokens are ultimately sold, the remaining tokens may also be distributed. As of press time, AIA is trading at $0.255, corresponding to a market capitalization of $51.03 million. Binance launched AIA U-margined perpetual contracts yesterday.

data.title: Gate launches a 5,000,000 USDT price volatility mitigation subsidy program.
data.description: According to the official announcement, Gate.io will launch a new round of its 5 million USDT market volatility mitigation subsidy program from 16:00 on January 21st to 00:00 on January 28th (UTC+8). This program is open to all users, and eligible users can easily receive a subsidy of up to 100 USDT. New users participating in contract trading for the first time or newly registered during the program will also receive an additional 50 USDT new user subsidy. The total subsidy amount is 5,000,000 USDT, and quantities are limited, available on a first-come, first-served basis. This promotion offers three categories of eligibility for subsidies: 1. Users who complete ≥100 USDT contract trading volume on Gate or other trading platforms between 10:00 on January 18th and 16:00 on January 21st (UTC+8); 2. Users who complete ≥2,000 USDT contract trading volume on Gate between 16:00 on January 21st and 00:00 on January 28th (UTC+8); 3. Users who participate in Gate contract trading of any currency for the first time during the promotion period, with a trading volume ≥1,000 USDT.

data.title: Coinbase CEO: The Governor of the Bank of France misunderstands Bitcoin; Bitcoin is more independent.
data.description: Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong, speaking at the World Economic Forum in Davos, Switzerland, pointed out a misunderstanding of Bitcoin by the Governor of the Bank of France. He stated that Bitcoin is a decentralized protocol, more independent, and can create a "healthy competitive" environment where people can make their own choices. (WatcherGuru)

data.title: Federal Reserve Urged to Include Bitcoin in 2026 Stress Tests
data.description: Pierre Rochard has formally requested the Federal Reserve to consider Bitcoin as a separate asset in its 2026 stress tests. According to NS3.AI, Rochard emphasizes Bitcoin's unique volatility and increasing institutional adoption as reasons for this inclusion. The request points out Bitcoin's 73.3% annualized volatility and complex market dynamics, arguing that existing combined crypto metrics fail to adequately assess its risk. This proposal emerges amid broader U.S. policy discussions on Bitcoin management and legislative initiatives to establish a strategic Bitcoin reserve.

data.title: Morgan Stanley: Gold's challenge to the dollar's hegemony has "no end in sight."
data.description: Morgan Stanley states that the dollar's role in the global system is being steadily and gradually weakened, but with limited credible alternative currencies remaining, gold has become the biggest challenger to the dollar in an increasingly multipolar world. According to Morgan Stanley's research, the dollar's international influence has declined across several indicators, including a decrease in its share of central bank foreign exchange reserves and a reduction in its use in corporate and emerging market sovereign debt issuance. Despite this, the dollar still holds the largest share of global reserves, suggesting that no truly significant challenger has yet emerged. However, the situation changes when gold is taken into account. Gold's share of central bank assets has risen from approximately 14% to 25%-28%, and this upward trend shows "no signs of slowing down." Risk premiums and hedging activities will continue to put pressure on the dollar while supporting gold demand. Furthermore, policy factors are currently at a "neutral to slightly accelerating" level in their role in promoting "de-dollarization," and the short-term evolution of these policies will determine how far this trend will ultimately go. (Jinshi)

data.title: A Reuters poll of 100 economists showed that 58 expect the Federal Reserve to keep the federal funds rate between 3.50% and 3.75% in Q1.
data.description: According to a Reuters poll, 58 out of 100 economists expect the Federal Reserve to keep the federal funds rate between 3.50% and 3.75% in the first quarter of 2026 (compared to at least one rate cut in a December poll). 55 of the 100 economists believe the Fed will resume rate cuts in June or later. (Jinshi)

data.title: Dutch cryptocurrency platform Finst has raised €8 million in Series A funding, led by Endeit Capital.
data.description: Dutch cryptocurrency platform Finst announced the completion of an €8 million Series A funding round, led by Endeit Capital, with participation from existing investors Eelko van Kooten, founder of Spinnin' Records, and Mark Franse, co-founder of DEGIRO. This brings Finst's total funding to €15 million. Founded in 2023, Finst is a licensed crypto asset service provider from the Dutch Financial Markets Authority (AFM), serving retail and institutional clients in 30 European countries. (Beincrypto)
